description: Axial-resolution split panel: two identical steel blocks, contact probe on top, two small reflectors A/B stacked close in depth on one beam line, mini A-scan strip beneath each. Left SHORT PULSE: tight 2-cycle packet draws down the beam, A-scan resolves two crisp peaks (TWO PEAKS). Right LONG PULSE: 7-cycle ringing packet, echoes smear into one broad hump with ringing tail (ONE HUMP, A+B?). Axial/depth axis fades in between halves.
